docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY VANDENHENGEL, JAN AS TO DEFENDANT CICOLANI, KERI ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-28-2014 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. "PLAINTIFF SUED HIS LANDLORD'S DAUGHTER--NEEDS TO SUE THE LANDLORD", PER JUDGE MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAIVES UNTIMELY SERVICE IN OPEN COURT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SC-105 REQUEST FOR COURT ORDER AND ANSWER (SMALL CLAIMS) FILED BY DEFENDANT CICOLANI, KERI
